session_id: ANL-2026-04-25-重建对于该项目的完全掌握和认知
topic: 重建对于 Fabric-v2 项目的完全掌握和认知
summary: Fabric-v2 docs have been thinned and converted from narrative-oriented documents into engineering reference documents. The core architecture is now documented through SPEC_INTERNAL, CODEBASE_LANDSCAPE, ARCHITECTURE_DECISIONS, CONVENTIONS, and RULE_REGISTRY, with source-line evidence and explicit future collaboration rules.

key_conclusions.point: The rule delivery kernel is get-rules plus plan-context over MCP/HTTP server services.
Stable ID is already an implemented architecture concept, not just a proposal.
The current repository root lacks an active Fabric registry, so rule scanning must distinguish template/example rules from active rules.
key_conclusions.evidence: .fabric contains only audit.jsonl; fab_plan_context reported missing .fabric/agents.meta.json

key_conclusions.point: Dashboard observation-first is a target constraint with current implementation drift.

recommendations.action: Keep SPEC_INTERNAL as the pre-code-change gate for core engine logic.
Update CODEBASE_LANDSCAPE whenever packages/ responsibilities change.
Use RULE_REGISTRY to bind stable IDs and distinguish active registry from templates/examples.
Handle Dashboard write-path drift in a separate implementation task if strict read-only is required.

intent_coverage.intent: Thin docs and remove narrative/ritual files.

findings_coverage.finding: get-rules hot path and priority algorithm
